content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 11, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 11, 2026, focused on stabilizing the agent orchestrator, enhancing cloud infrastructure, and expanding the plugin ecosystem. Key achievements include enabling autonomous sub-agent dispatching, improving cloud-api affiliate tracking, and resolving critical CLI installation issues.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Orchestration & Cloud Infrastructure**
*   Enabled autonomous sub-agent dispatching by wiring the `USE_SKILL` broker, allowing agents to drive monetized-app loops ([#8275](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8275)).
*   Improved cloud infrastructure by managing data-plane private networks via Terraform and decoupling control-plane DNS from VM creation ([#8392](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8392), [#8388](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8388)).
*   Fixed cloud-api affiliate revenue-share tracking for embeddings and voice inference ([#8264](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8264)).

**Plugin Registry & Ecosystem Expansion**
*   Registered `elizaos-plugin-neynar-search` and `elizaos-plugin-coinrailz` as third-party plugins ([#8346](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8346), [#8382](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8382)).
*   Added `@usenami/plugin-signer` to the community registry, enabling secure order signing via AWS Nitro Enclaves ([#8294](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8294)).

**Bug Fixes & Maintenance**
*   Resolved orchestrator issues, including session timeout handling and Windows environment variable forwarding ([#8286](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8286), [#8285](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8285)).
*   Fixed cloud-frontend environment variable passthrough and cleaned up stale lifeops-ui dependencies ([#8312](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8312), [#8316](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8316)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**CLI & Installation Stability**
*   Resolved global installation crashes for `elizaos` and `@elizaos/cli` by fixing bin shim imports and removing incompatible dependencies ([#8000](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8000), [#8001](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8001)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

**Android Build & Plugin Synchronization**
*   [#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387): Ongoing debugging regarding web-less APK builds and Capacitor plugin registration. Recent findings highlight that `capacitor.plugins.json` must be perfectly synced with compiled classes to avoid total plugin failure. Additionally, the asset server's catch-all behavior is masking relative-URL bugs, which are being addressed by resolving rooted paths against the `apiBase` and improving request handling.
